title: taraxacum pseudolilacinum
intro: Taraxacum pseudolilacinum, also known as the yellow dandelion or false lilac dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a medicinal herb that has been used to treat various ailments, with its roots and leaves exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudolilacinum include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Taraxacum pseudolilacinum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw addition to salads or smoothies.
